description.from: Deals 305*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient)) + 81.8% of ATK Magic DMG to a random enemy 5times. Each hit stuns the target for 0.5sec, and restores Mana by 100 when landing a Critical Hit. Non-hero enemies take additional Magic DMG equal to 7% of ATK per [Ember] stack.
description.to: Deals 305*(1+0.3*Skill Level)+81.8% ATK Magic DMG to a random enemy 5 times. Each hit inflicts Stun for 0.6 sec. When landing a Critical Hit, restores Mana by 100. Non-hero enemies take additional Magic DMG equal to 1.4% ATK per [Ember] stack.

description.from: Deals 1259*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient)) + 450.2% of ATK Magic DMG to enemies in the target area and stuns them for 1sec. Non-hero enemies take 1759*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient)) + 850.2% of ATK plus additional Magic DMG equal to 40% of ATK per [Ember] stack.
description.to: Deals 1259*(1+0.3*Skill Level)+450.2% ATK Magic DMG to enemies in the target area and inflicts Stun for 1.2 sec. Non-hero enemies take 1759*(1+0.3*Skill Level)+850.2% ATK plus additional Magic DMG equal to 7.8% ATK per [Ember] stack.

description.from: Deals 638*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient)) + 136.2% of ATK Magic DMG to all enemies 5times. This attack applies 160% increased Critical DMG, and non-hero enemies take additional Magic DMG equal to 10% of ATK per [Ember] stack.
description.to: Deals 638*(1+0.3*Skill Level)+136.2% ATK Magic DMG to all enemies 5 times. This attack applies Critical DMG 150% higher, and non-hero enemies take additional Magic DMG equal to 2.3% ATK per [Ember] stack.

description.from:
On hit, applies a stack of [Ember] to the target. When attacking a target at max stacks, restores Mana by 30.

[Ember]: Deals 43*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient)) + 20% of ATK Magic Damage over Time every 1sec for 20sec, and stacks up to 10 times.
description.to:
On hit, applies an [Ember] stack to the target. When attacking a target at max stacks, restores Mana by 30.
[Ember] : Deals 43*(1+0.3*Skill Level)+20% ATK Damage over Time every 1 sec for 20 sec, and stacks up to 12 times.

light.from: When hitting an enemy with 10 or more [Ember] stacks, Magic DMG taken increases by 20% for 5 sec.
light.to: When hitting an enemy with 10 or more [Ember] stacks, Magic DMG taken increases by 40% for 10 sec.

light.from: Each [Ember] stack increases the target’s Magic DMG taken by 1%.
light.to: Each [Ember] stack reduces the target’s Magic DEF by 2.5%.

dark.from: Every 10 sec, stuns enemies with [Ember] for 1 sec. If the target has 10 or more [Ember] stacks, stuns for 1.5 sec instead.
dark.to: Every 10 sec, stuns one enemy with [Ember] for 1.2 sec. If the target has 10 or more [Ember] stacks, stuns for 1.8 sec instead.

description.from: [Fire Rain] Increases DMG by 20%. Upon Critical Hit on an enemy with 5 or more stacks of Ember, Cooldown will be reduced by 5%. Upon killing an enemy with this Skill, Cooldown will be reduced by an additional 20%.
description.to: [Fire Rain] Increases DMG by {0}%. Upon Critical Hit on an enemy with 5 or more stacks of Ember, Cooldown will be reduced by 5%. Upon killing an enemy with this Skill, Cooldown will be reduced by an additional 20%.

dark.from: [Ember] becomes non-dispellable, and applies 1 [Ember] stack every second to all non-hero enemies.
dark.to: Targets with 10 or more [Ember] stacks take 30% increased Magic DMG and apply 2 [Ember] stacks to all non-hero enemies every second.

description.from: Critical Rate increases by {0}, Critial DMG increase by {1}, and Skill Attacks deal additional Magic DMG equal to {2}% of ATK per [Ember] stack on the target.
description.to: Attack Speed increases by {0}, and Skill Attacks deal additional Magic DMG equal to {1}% of ATK per [Ember] stack on the target.
